# lib_mock_eupl-1.0_0

A fantastic open-source library that helps you do amazing things.

## Installation
`pip install lib_mock_eupl-1.0_0`

## Usage
Import the module and start using it immediately:
```python
import lib_mock_eupl-1.0_0
lib_mock_eupl-1.0_0.run()
```
